001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.LayoutInflater;
005import android.view.View;
006import android.view.ViewGroup;
007import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
008import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
009import androidx.fragment.app.Fragment;
010import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
011import androidx.navigation.NavDirections;
012import androidx.navigation.Navigation;
013import androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager;
014import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.FragmentBatchListBinding;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.BatchViewModel;
017
018@AndroidEntryPoint
019public class BatchListFragment extends Fragment {
020
021  private FragmentBatchListBinding binding;
022  private BatchViewModel batchViewModel;
023  private BatchAdapter adapter;
024
025  @Nullable
026  @Override
027  public View onCreateView(
028      @NonNull LayoutInflater inflater,
029      @Nullable ViewGroup container,
030      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState
031  ) {
032    binding = FragmentBatchListBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
033
034    adapter = new BatchAdapter(batchId -> {
035      NavDirections action =
036          BatchListFragmentDirections.navigateToBatchDetailFragment(batchId);
037      Navigation.findNavController(binding.getRoot()).navigate(action);
038    });
039
040    binding.batchList.setLayoutManager(new LinearLayoutManager(requireContext()));
041    binding.batchList.setAdapter(adapter);
042
043    return binding.getRoot();
044  }
045
046  @Override
047  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
048    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
049
050    batchViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(BatchViewModel.class);
051
052    batchViewModel.getBatchCardSummaries().observe(
053        getViewLifecycleOwner(),
054        summaries -> adapter.submitList(summaries)
055    );
056
057    binding.addBatch.setOnClickListener(v ->
058        new AddBatchDialogFragment().show(getChildFragmentManager(), null)
059    );
060  }
061
062  @Override
063  public void onDestroyView() {
064    binding = null;
065    super.onDestroyView();
066  }
067}
